name: sdlc-agent-template
description: Multi-agent system for building enterprise applications with production-quality standards. Includes Harness orchestrator, 8 QA reviewers, and 11 domain skills.

chatAgents.name: Harness
chatAgents.description: SDLC orchestrator — coordinates all phases from requirements to release

chatAgents.name: Analyst
chatAgents.description: Requirements analysis and stakeholder interview agent

chatAgents.name: Scaffolder
chatAgents.description: Project scaffolding using Azure project templates

chatAgents.name: Implementer
chatAgents.description: Code implementation following layered architecture patterns

chatAgents.name: Deployer
chatAgents.description: Azure deployment with Bicep, Container Apps, and azd

chatAgents.name: Documenter
chatAgents.description: Architecture Decision Records and API documentation

chatAgents.name: ReleaseManager
chatAgents.description: Release script preparation and publishing workflow

chatAgents.name: QACoordinator
chatAgents.description: Orchestrates all QA reviewers for comprehensive quality checks

chatAgents.name: ArchitectureReviewer
chatAgents.description: Reviews architecture, layering, and dependency compliance

chatAgents.name: CodeQualityReviewer
chatAgents.description: Reviews code quality, naming, imports, and dead code

chatAgents.name: SecurityReviewer
chatAgents.description: OWASP Top 10, secrets scanning, and dependency audit

chatAgents.name: TestCoverageReviewer
chatAgents.description: Reviews test coverage, AAA structure, and test quality

chatAgents.name: UXAccessibilityReviewer
chatAgents.description: Reviews UX patterns, accessibility, and ARIA compliance

chatAgents.name: LLMBehaviorReviewer
chatAgents.description: Reviews LLM prompts, agent behavior, and data handling

chatAgents.name: DeploymentReadinessReviewer
chatAgents.description: Reviews deployment readiness, error handling, and observability

chatAgents.name: AzureComplianceReviewer
chatAgents.description: Reviews Azure compliance, RBAC, and resource configuration

chatAgents.name: RAIReviewer
chatAgents.description: Responsible AI review for fairness, transparency, and safety

chatAgents.name: QABugChecklistReviewer
chatAgents.description: QA bug checklist verification and test scenario validation
